title: A to Z Lullaby
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
A, B, C, the day is done
D, E, F, goodnight sun
G, H, I, the stars appear
J, K, L, your dreams are near

[Chorus]
Letters dancing in the air
Floating gently everywhere
From A to Z, we'll softly sing
And hear the peace that nighttime brings

[Verse 2]
M, N, O, the moon is high
P, Q, R, a lullaby
S, T, U, the world is calm
V, W, X, a soothing balm

[Chorus]
Letters dancing in the air
Floating gently everywhere
From A to Z, we'll softly sing
And hear the peace that nighttime brings

[Outro]
Y and Z, the alphabet's through
Sweet dreams tonight, sweet dreams for you

title: Alphabet Dreams
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
A is for the angel's song
B is for where you belong
C is for the cozy bed
D is for your sleepy head

[Chorus]
Sing the letters soft and low
A, B, C, D as we go
Every letter holds a dream
Drifting down a moonlit stream

[Verse 2]
E is for the evening sky
F is for a lullaby
G is for the gentle breeze
H is for the rustling trees

[Chorus]
Sing the letters soft and low
E, F, G, H as we go
Every letter holds a dream
Drifting down a moonlit stream

[Verse 3]
I and J and K, goodnight
L and M, sleep tight, sleep tight
N and O and P, sweet dreams
Q and R and S, moonbeams

[Outro]
T, U, V, the night is deep
W, X, Y, Z... now sleep

title: Autumn Leaves
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
The autumn leaves are falling down
In shades of red and golden brown
They spiral slowly through the air
Like tiny dancers everywhere

[Chorus]
Let the seasons sing to you
Amber, crimson, every hue
Autumn wraps you warm and tight
In a blanket made of light

[Verse 2]
The pumpkins rest upon the vine
The harvest moon begins to shine
The air is crisp, the world is still
A quiet calm upon the hill

[Chorus]
Let the seasons sing to you
Amber, crimson, every hue
Autumn wraps you warm and tight
In a blanket made of light

[Outro]
The leaves will fall and come to rest
Just like you, my sleepy guest

title: Barnyard Lullaby
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
The cow goes moo, then shuts its eyes
The rooster sleeps, no more sunrise
The pig is snoring in the pen
The horse won't gallop till again

[Chorus]
The farm is sleeping, still and quiet
No more mooing, no more riot
Close your eyes like all the rest
Lay your head upon your nest

[Verse 2]
The sheep counts... well, the sheep counts sheep
The goat is falling fast asleep
The cat is curled up by the fire
The barn owl perches ever higher

[Chorus]
The farm is sleeping, still and quiet
No more mooing, no more riot
Close your eyes like all the rest
Lay your head upon your nest

[Outro]
The farmer smiles and whispers low
Goodnight farm, goodnight, sleep slow

title: Colors of the Night
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Purple sky and indigo
Colors only nighttime knows
Silver moonlight, golden star
Shining gently from afar

[Chorus]
What color are your dreams tonight?
Are they dark or are they bright?
Every dream's a different hue
The night paints something new for you

[Verse 2]
Midnight blue across the lake
Rosy dawn when you awake
Amber streetlights, softly gleaming
Close your eyes and start your dreaming

[Chorus]
What color are your dreams tonight?
Are they dark or are they bright?
Every dream's a different hue
The night paints something new for you

[Outro]
The colors swirl and gently blend
Into dreams that never end

title: Counting Stars
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
One little star above the trees
Two little stars float on the breeze
Three little stars begin to glow
Four little stars in a gentle row

[Chorus]
Close your eyes and count with me
Dream of stars you'll someday see
One by one they light the night
Counting stars till morning light

[Verse 2]
Five little stars across the sky
Six little stars go drifting by
Seven stars dance left and right
Eight little stars so warm and bright

[Chorus]
Close your eyes and count with me
Dream of stars you'll someday see
One by one they light the night
Counting stars till morning light

[Outro]
Nine and ten, the counting's done
Goodnight stars, goodnight everyone
Close your eyes, the stars will keep
Counting dreams while you're asleep

title: Forest Lullaby
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
The forest whispers soft tonight
The fireflies are the only light
The ferns are curling, going to rest
The owl is sitting in its nest

[Verse 2]
The mushrooms glow beneath the pine
The stream is humming something fine
The fox is sleeping in its den
The forest breathes and rests again

[Chorus]
Hush now, hush now, little one
The forest sings when day is done
Every leaf and every tree
Is sleeping now so peacefully

[Verse 3]
The moss is soft beneath the stone
The night wind hums a gentle tone
The acorns dream of growing tall
The forest night embraces all

[Chorus]
Hush now, hush now, little one
The forest sings when day is done
Every leaf and every tree
Is sleeping now so peacefully

title: Gentle Rain
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Listen to the gentle rain
Tapping on the windowpane
Every drop a tiny song
Humming softly all night long

[Chorus]
Rain, rain, sing to me
Soft as any melody
Wash the day and all its noise
Into quiet, peaceful joys

[Verse 2]
Puddles forming on the ground
Rain is making its soft sound
Drip and drop and drip again
Nature's sweetest little friend

[Chorus]
Rain, rain, sing to me
Soft as any melody
Wash the day and all its noise
Into quiet, peaceful joys

[Outro]
The rain is gentle, the rain is kind
Leave the waking world behind

title: Goodnight World
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Goodnight moon up in the sky
Goodnight clouds that float on by
Goodnight stars that softly gleam
Goodnight world, it's time to dream

[Chorus]
Goodnight, goodnight, goodnight, goodnight
Everything is wrapped in light
Goodnight, goodnight, goodnight, goodnight
Peaceful, gentle, soft, and bright

[Verse 2]
Goodnight trees and goodnight flowers
Goodnight to the quiet hours
Goodnight birds upon the hill
Goodnight wind, so calm and still

[Chorus]
Goodnight, goodnight, goodnight, goodnight
Everything is wrapped in light
Goodnight, goodnight, goodnight, goodnight
Peaceful, gentle, soft, and bright

[Outro]
Goodnight baby, goodnight dear
Close your eyes, for I am here

title: Little Creatures
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
The bunny hops into its bed
The kitten rests its furry head
The puppy curls up by the door
The duckling won't quack anymore

[Chorus]
Little creatures, big and small
Nighttime comes for one and all
Snuggle close and close your eyes
Tomorrow holds a new surprise

[Verse 2]
The mouse is sleeping in the hay
The robin sang its song today
The turtle pulls inside its shell
The firefly says all is well

[Chorus]
Little creatures, big and small
Nighttime comes for one and all
Snuggle close and close your eyes
Tomorrow holds a new surprise

[Outro]
Every creature, every friend
Sleeping now till darkness ends

title: Mama's Lullaby
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Before you came, I dreamed of you
I wondered what you'd grow into
And now you're here beneath the moon
I'd hold this moment, not let go too soon

[Chorus]
Mama's here, mama's near
Mama's love will always be right here
Close your eyes, feel my heart
We will never be apart

[Verse 2]
Your tiny fingers, tiny toes
The way you smile and scrunch your nose
I'll sing this song a thousand nights
And hold you close and hold you tight

[Chorus]
Mama's here, mama's near
Mama's love will always be right here
Close your eyes, feel my heart
We will never be apart

[Outro]
Sleep now, darling, safe with me
You are everything to me

title: Ocean Dreams
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
The ocean hums a lullaby
Beneath the wide and open sky
The waves are rocking to and fro
A gentle rhythm, soft and slow

[Chorus]
Drift away on ocean dreams
Floating on the silver streams
Let the waves carry you deep
Into a warm and peaceful sleep

[Verse 2]
The seashells whisper on the shore
The tide comes in and out once more
The lighthouse blinks its sleepy eye
The seagulls hush their evening cry

[Chorus]
Drift away on ocean dreams
Floating on the silver streams
Let the waves carry you deep
Into a warm and peaceful sleep

[Outro]
The ocean sings its ancient song
It's been singing all along

title: One Two Three to Sleep
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
One is for the moon so bright
Two is for the owls at night
Three is for the lullaby
Floating gently through the sky

[Chorus]
One, two, three, now close your eyes
Four, five, six, hear lullabies
Seven, eight, the world is still
Nine and ten, sleep if you will

[Verse 2]
One is for a sleepy yawn
Two is for the coming dawn
Three is for the dreams you'll find
Soft and warm and sweet and kind

[Chorus]
One, two, three, now close your eyes
Four, five, six, hear lullabies
Seven, eight, the world is still
Nine and ten, sleep if you will

[Outro]
Count again from one to three
One... two... three...
Now sleep for me

title: Painted Dreams
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Paint the sky a gentle blue
Paint the stars in silver hue
Paint the moon a creamy white
Paint the world in softest light

[Chorus]
Painted dreams in every shade
Colors dancing, never fade
Close your eyes and you will see
A painted world for you and me

[Verse 2]
Paint the meadow emerald green
Softest colors ever seen
Paint the roses pink and red
Paint the pillow for your head

[Chorus]
Painted dreams in every shade
Colors dancing, never fade
Close your eyes and you will see
A painted world for you and me

[Outro]
All the colors start to blend
Painted dreams that never end

title: Papa's Song
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Your papa's voice is not the best
It's not as smooth as all the rest
But every note is full of love
And that's what all these songs are made of

[Chorus]
Papa's singing just for you
A little crooked, a little true
Not every note will land just right
But I will sing you through the night

[Verse 2]
I'll sing of mountains, sing of seas
I'll sing of rustling autumn trees
I'll sing until the morning comes
And carry you through every song

[Chorus]
Papa's singing just for you
A little crooked, a little true
Not every note will land just right
But I will sing you through the night

[Outro]
One day you'll know this song by heart
And that will be the sweetest part

title: Rainbow Slumber
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Red is for the setting sun
Sinking low when day is done
Orange glows on evening clouds
Soft and warm above the crowds

[Chorus]
Colors painting you to sleep
Colors gentle, colors deep
Rainbow dreams are yours tonight
Wrapped in colors, warm and bright

[Verse 2]
Yellow like a candle's flame
Green is whispering your name
Blue is for the quiet sea
Purple twilight, wild and free

[Chorus]
Colors painting you to sleep
Colors gentle, colors deep
Rainbow dreams are yours tonight
Wrapped in colors, warm and bright

[Outro]
Every color fades to white
Peaceful, still, and pure as light
Close your eyes and softly rest
Dreaming in the colors you love best

title: River Lullaby
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
The river flows through fields of green
The quietest sound you've ever seen
It bends and turns and carries on
A liquid, lazy, wandering song

[Chorus]
Follow the river, follow it home
Follow the river, you're never alone
It knows the way to peaceful sleep
Through meadows wide and forests deep

[Verse 2]
The willows lean beside the stream
The evening drifts into a dream
A frog is croaking one last tune
Beneath the pale and silver moon

[Chorus]
Follow the river, follow it home
Follow the river, you're never alone
It knows the way to peaceful sleep
Through meadows wide and forests deep

[Outro]
The river rests and so should you
Goodnight, sweet child, the whole night through

title: Safe in Your Arms
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
The world outside is big and wide
But here with you I'll stay beside
No storm can reach us, no wind can blow
Inside these walls where love can grow

[Chorus]
Safe in your arms is where I'll be
Safe in your arms eternally
The night is long, the stars are bright
But all I need is here tonight

[Verse 2]
Your heartbeat is a steady drum
A gentle rhythm, soft and calm
I'll close my eyes and find my way
To dreams of another perfect day

[Chorus]
Safe in your arms is where I'll be
Safe in your arms eternally
The night is long, the stars are bright
But all I need is here tonight

[Outro]
Hold me close and hold me tight
Safe in your arms, goodnight, goodnight

title: Sailing to Sleep
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
A tiny boat upon the sea
Is sailing off with you and me
The sails are full, the wind is light
We're sailing gently through the night

[Chorus]
Sail away, sail away
Past the dolphins and the bay
Over moonlit waves we glide
Rocking gently, side to side

[Verse 2]
The fish below are fast asleep
The whales are dreaming in the deep
The stars reflected on the tide
A million diamonds, far and wide

[Chorus]
Sail away, sail away
Past the dolphins and the bay
Over moonlit waves we glide
Rocking gently, side to side

[Outro]
We've reached the shore of sleepy land
I'll carry you across the sand

title: Sleepy Letters
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Whisper A into the night
Whisper B by candlelight
Whisper C upon the breeze
Whisper D among the trees

[Chorus]
Sleepy letters, soft and small
Hear them whisper, hear them call
Every letter knows your name
Every night they sound the same

[Verse 2]
Whisper E across the moon
Whisper F, you'll sleep so soon
Whisper G, the stars are bright
Whisper H, and say goodnight

[Chorus]
Sleepy letters, soft and small
Hear them whisper, hear them call
Every letter knows your name
Every night they sound the same

[Outro]
No more letters left to say
Close your eyes and drift away

title: Sleepy Safari
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
The lion yawns beneath the tree
The elephant sleeps peacefully
The giraffe bends its long neck low
The zebra rests in evening glow

[Chorus]
All the animals close their eyes
Under African starlit skies
Even wild things need their rest
Curl up now, you're safe and blessed

[Verse 2]
The monkey swings into its nest
The hippo lays upon its chest
The parrot tucks its head to dream
The crickets hum a sleepy theme

[Chorus]
All the animals close their eyes
Under African starlit skies
Even wild things need their rest
Curl up now, you're safe and blessed

[Outro]
The safari sleeps, the night is long
The whole wide world sings this song
Goodnight, goodnight, little one
Tomorrow brings another sun

title: Starlight Serenade
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
The stars are singing just for you
A silver song, a golden hue
They dance across the velvet night
A thousand candles burning bright

[Chorus]
Starlight, starlight, fill the air
Starlight, starlight, everywhere
Wrap my baby in your glow
Sing a song of long ago

[Verse 2]
The Milky Way's a river wide
The constellations side by side
Each star a note, each note a prayer
A serenade beyond compare

[Chorus]
Starlight, starlight, fill the air
Starlight, starlight, everywhere
Wrap my baby in your glow
Sing a song of long ago

[Outro]
The stars will watch while you sleep tight
A serenade of gentle light

title: Ten Little Dreams
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
One little dream about a cloud
Two little dreams, not too loud
Three little dreams of butterflies
Four little dreams behind your eyes

[Chorus]
Ten little dreams are waiting here
Ten little dreams so soft and dear
Count them gently, count them slow
Watch them shimmer, watch them glow

[Verse 2]
Five little dreams of falling snow
Six little dreams all in a row
Seven dreams of morning dew
Eight little dreams just for you

[Bridge]
Nine little dreams begin to play
Ten little dreams to end the day

[Chorus]
Ten little dreams are waiting here
Ten little dreams so soft and dear
Count them gently, count them slow
Watch them shimmer, watch them glow

title: Twinkle and Dream
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Twinkle, twinkle, little one
Another day is nearly done
The sky is lit with diamonds bright
A thousand wishes in the night

[Chorus]
Dream of stardust, dream of light
Dream of wings that take you high
Close your eyes and you can fly
Through the starlit midnight sky

[Verse 2]
The moon is watching over you
The night is still, the air is cool
A gentle breeze will be your guide
Through constellations far and wide

[Chorus]
Dream of stardust, dream of light
Dream of wings that take you high
Close your eyes and you can fly
Through the starlit midnight sky

[Outro]
Twinkle, twinkle, close your eyes
Stars will guard you through the night
